name: Tree Traversals — Inorder, Level-Order, Zigzag, Diameter

metadata.career_relevance: Tree traversals appear in every Flipkart/Amazon interview. Inorder BST = sorted. Level-order BFS = shortest path. Diameter/LCA are top-5 tree questions.

hook.real_world_problem:
// Tree traversal orders:
// Inorder (L-N-R): BST → sorted. Preorder (N-L-R): copy tree. Post (L-R-N): delete tree. Level: BFS.

concept_explanation.inorder: L-N-R for BST gives sorted output.
concept_explanation.level: BFS with size snapshot for level boundaries.

key_takeaways: Inorder iterative: push lefts, pop, visit, go right
Level order: size snapshot before inner for-loop
Zigzag: addFirst/addLast toggle by boolean flag
reflection.next_topic_preview: Next: Binary Tree Problems — depth, LCA, balance, path sum.
